title: platycladus decussata
intro: Platycladus decussata, also known as Chinese Arborvitae or Oriental Arborvitae, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Platycladus decussata include its ability to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and remedies.
